project.objective: Identify the parents of Patrick Flynn, born ca. 1845 in Pennsylvania, died 1908 in Schuylkill County, PA

questions.question: Who were the parents of Patrick Flynn (b. ~1845, PA, d. 1908)?
questions.rationale: This is the primary research objective.

log.notes: Located the 'Flynn Family Tree' on Ancestry.com. Lists Thomas Flynn (b. ~1815, Ireland) as Patrick Flynn's father. The tree owner has not attached any original source records to support this claim — no census images, no vital records, no church records. The relationship is asserted without citation.

sources.citation: Flynn Family Tree, Ancestry.com Member Trees, accessed 15 May 2026. Tree owner: [username withheld]. No underlying source records cited.
sources.notes: Compiled source only. No original records attached. This is an unsourced claim and must be verified against original records before being used as a research foundation.

assertions.value: Father: Thomas Flynn (per Flynn Family Tree, Ancestry.com)
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Compiled online tree with no original sources cited. The basis for this claim is unknown — it may derive from another unsourced tree, a misidentification, or an unrecorded family tradition. Cannot be treated as evidence until verified against original records.

person_evidence.rationale: Online tree claim only. No original sources support the relationship. Needs verification.

hypotheses.claim: Thomas Flynn was the father of Patrick Flynn
hypotheses.notes: Claim derives from a single unsourced online family tree. No original record has corroborated this. Must be treated as a hypothesis to be tested, not an established fact.
